message:
🐛 Add useCardLoadingState to RBACExplorer demo card (#1141)

Missing from PR #1140 — the hook was reverted by pre-commit hooks.
This ensures the RBAC Explorer card reports its demo data state to
CardWrapper synchronously, fixing the cache compliance test failure.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
